chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَحِلُّ لِلرَّجُلِ مِنِ امْرَأَتِهِ وَ هِيَ طَامِثٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 176 – What is Permissible for the man, from his woman, and she is menstruating

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/382)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (20/382)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) مَا يَحِلُّ لِلرَّجُلِ مِنَ الْمَرْأَةِ وَ هِيَ حَائِضٌ قَالَ كُلُّ شَيْ‏ءٍ غَيْرَ الْفَرْجِ قَالَ ثُمَّ قَالَ إِنَّمَا الْمَرْأَةُ لُعْبَةُ الرَّجُلِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Salma Bin Al Khattab, from Ali Bin Al Hassan, from Muhammad Bin Ziyad, from Aban Bin Usman and Al Husayn Bin Abu Yusuf, from Abdul Malik Bin Amro who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘What is Permissible for the man, from the woman, and she is menstruating?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Everything apart from the front private part’. Then he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But rather, the woman is the toy of the man’.
en.sarwar: 4. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Salmah ibn a-Khattab from Ali ibn al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn Ziyad from Aban ibn ‘Uthman and al-Husayn ibn Yusuf from ‘Abd al-Malik ibn ‘Amr who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about what is permissible for a man to enjoy with his wife during her experiencing Hayd (menses). He (the Imam) said, ‘Everything except her vulva.’ He (the Imam) then said, ‘A Woman is just like a doll for man.’”
